name: agrosmart-selenium
description: Selenium E2E Test Suite for AgroSmartHub 3.0

scripts.test: npx mocha tests/**/*.test.js tests/**/*.js --timeout 30000 --reporter json --reporter-options output=results.json
scripts.report:all: npm run report:html && npm run report:excel && npm run report:summary
scripts.ci: npm run test || true && npm run report:all
